title: Oru Thadavai Solvaya Lyrics Vaseegara
stanzas:
<div>
<div>
Oru Thadavai Solvaya Lyrics Vaseegara

Oru thadavai solvaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.
oru paarvai paarpaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.

kadhal oru pugaiyai pola
maraithu vaithaal
therindhuvidum

kadhalil thaan pookkal modhi
malaigal kooda udainthu vidum

unnai olikkaathe
ennai vadhaikkaathe
endrum idhayathil
ilakkanam kidayaathe

nadhiyil theriyum
nilavin uruvam
nadhikku sondham illai.

ninaipathellaam
nadakkum vazhkai.
yaarukkum amaivathillai.

unakum enakkum
vizhundha mudichi
thaanaai vizhunthathillai.

ulaga urundai udaiyum podhum
kadhal udaivathillai.

minmini desathu sondhakaaran
vinmeen kaetpathu thavaraagum.

varalatril vazhkindra kadhal ellaam
valiyodu poraadum kadhal thaane.

Oru thadavai solvaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.
oru paarvai paarpaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.

nerunga ninaikkum
ninaivai marakka
nenjam ninaikkiradhu.

kanavil pookkum pookkal
parikka penmai azhaikindrathu

kilaiyai murithu potu vidalaam
vaerai enna seivaai?
tharaiyai udaithu mulaikkum podhu
anbe engu selvaai

malligai pookkal udhirvathellaam
marathadi nizhalukku sondhamillai
unnodu naan vazha poraaduven
nee indri ponaalo thallaaduven.

Oru thadavai solvaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.
oru paarvai paarpaayaa
unnai enakku pidikkum endru.

kadhal oru pugaiyai pola
maraithu vaithaal
therindhuvidum

kadhalil thaan pookkal modhi
malaigal kooda udainthu vidum

unnai olikkaathe
ennai vadhaikkaathe
endrum idhayathil
ilakkanam kidayaathe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, highlighting the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Vaseegara, the song plays during a pivotal moment that emphasizes the protagonists' emotional bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi and Hariharan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oru Thadavai Solvaya was composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 31, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Thadavai Solvaya, the lyrical beauty unfolds as the singers express their heartfelt emotions towards love. The song encapsulates the essence of romance, portraying the longing and admiration one feels for their beloved. Set against the backdrop of Vaseegara, it serves as a poignant reminder of the tender moments shared between lovers. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Thadavai Solvaya from Vaseegara is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Hariharan, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with romantic souls. The collaboration of S.A. Rajkumar's music adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for anyone in love.
stanzaMeanings: I want to say something to you, that I like you. Just a glance at you makes me feel this way.
Love hides like a flower and reveals itself when discovered.
In love, flowers bloom and even the mountains will break apart.
Don't let me go, don't let me be hurt; my heart cannot bear it.
The moon's shape is known in the river, but the river has no attachment.
Everything we think will happen in life; there is no peace for anyone.
For you and me, the fallen bond has not truly fallen.
The world can turn, but love cannot be destroyed.
In a bright land, the one who listens to the stars may be mistaken.
In the past, love that grows will fight with strength; it is love itself.
I want to say something to you, that I like you. Just a glance at you makes me feel this way.
The heart that thinks deeply cannot forget the thoughts that come.
In dreams, flowers bloom and beauty calls out.
If I break the branch, what else can I do? When the earth is broken, where will love go?
All jasmine flowers have no connection to the shadow of the tree; I will live with you, and if you leave, I will not let go.
I want to say something to you, that I like you. Just a glance at you makes me feel this way.
Love hides like a flower and reveals itself when discovered.
In love, flowers bloom and even the mountains will break apart.
Don't let me go, don't let me be hurt; my heart cannot bear it.
